name: Dutch Baby
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a large, heavy cast iron pan in the oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Mix the eggs and flour together. Beat well.
3. Add milk and beat again thoroughly.
4. Stir in vanilla extract and ground nutmeg.
5. Melt the butter.
6. Remove the pan from the oven and brush the melted butter over the surface.
7. Pour the batter into the pan, filling it to the top.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the Dutch baby is golden brown and puffed.
9. Sprinkle with lemon juice and confectioners' sugar to taste before serving hot.
